values.title: IronFit Gym
values.hero_description: Premium fitness facility with world-class equipment, expert trainers, and a supportive community dedicated to helping you reach your goals.
values.cta_description: Start your journey today with a free 7-day trial. No commitment, no pressure -- just results.

values.title: HIIT Blast
values.body:
High-intensity interval training that pushes your limits with alternating bursts of explosive cardio and strength exercises. Burn up to 800 calories per session while building lean muscle.

What to Expect

45 minutes of kettlebell swings, box jumps, battle ropes, and bodyweight movements designed to maximize caloric burn and boost your metabolism for hours after class.

values.title: Power Spin
values.body:
Immersive indoor cycling with concert-quality sound, dynamic lighting, and motivating instructors. A full-body cardio experience that will leave you energized.

Class Structure

Hill climbs, sprint intervals, and recovery rides set to curated playlists. Each class is a unique journey designed to challenge and inspire.

values.title: Strength Foundations
values.body:
Master the fundamentals of strength training with proper form and progressive overload. Perfect for beginners building a base and experienced lifters refining technique.

Program Focus

Compound lifts including deadlifts, squats, bench press, and overhead press with expert coaching and personalized modifications.

values.title: Boxing Fit
values.body:
Boxing-inspired fitness combining heavy bag work, pad drills, and conditioning circuits. Builds speed, power, coordination, and mental toughness in a high-energy environment.

No Experience Needed

Coaches break down every combination step by step. All skill levels welcome -- gloves and wraps are provided for first-timers.

values.title: Marcus Johnson
values.body:
12 years of competitive powerlifting and coaching experience. Marcus specializes in building raw strength and confidence through evidence-based programming tailored to each client's goals and ability level.

Whether you are training for your first competition or simply want to feel stronger in everyday life, Marcus will design a program that gets you there safely and efficiently.

values.title: Sarah Kim
values.body:
Former Division I track athlete who brings infectious energy to every session. Sarah combines sport science with creative programming for challenging, fun workouts that deliver real results.

Her specialties include metabolic conditioning, athletic performance, and body recomposition for clients who want to look and feel their best.

values.title: David Chen
values.body:
Former amateur boxing champion combining traditional boxing technique with modern sports science. David specializes in functional training, mobility work, and injury prevention.

His client-first approach focuses on sustainable fitness habits and long-term progress over quick fixes.

photo.alt: David Chen, boxing and functional trainer

values.title: Basic
values.body: Full access to the gym floor, cardio zone, and free weight area during staffed hours. The perfect plan for self-directed fitness enthusiasts.
values.includes:
• Gym floor access during staffed hours
  • Cardio and free weight zones
  • Locker room and showers
  • Free initial fitness assessment

values.title: Premium
values.body: Our most popular membership with 24/7 keycard access, unlimited group fitness classes, and exclusive recovery zone perks. Everything you need to train on your terms.
values.includes:
• 24/7 keycard access
  • Unlimited group fitness classes
  • Recovery zone (sauna, cold plunge)
  • 2 personal training sessions per month
  • 2 guest passes per month

values.title: Elite
values.body: The ultimate fitness experience. Unlimited personal training, priority class booking, private locker, and VIP amenities for members who demand the best.
values.includes:
• Everything in Premium
  • Unlimited personal training
  • Priority class booking
  • Private locker
  • Monthly body composition analysis
  • Complimentary protein bar and towel service

values.title: About IronFit Gym
values.body:
Founded in 2015, IronFit Gym was built on a simple belief: everyone deserves access to world-class fitness facilities and expert guidance, regardless of experience level.

Our Mission

We empower our community through fitness with state-of-the-art equipment, certified trainers, and an inclusive, supportive culture where every member feels at home.

Our Values

  • Excellence -- Highest standards in equipment, cleanliness, and coaching
  • Community -- Genuine connections and mutual support among members
  • Integrity -- Honest, science-based fitness guidance with no gimmicks
  • Accessibility -- Programs for every body, every level, every goal

values.title: Frequently Asked Questions
values.body:
What should I bring to my first visit?

Comfortable workout clothes, athletic shoes, a water bottle, and a towel. We provide everything else you need.

Can I freeze my membership?

Yes. All memberships can be frozen for up to 3 months per year at no additional cost.

Do you offer student or military discounts?

Yes, we offer 15% off for students and active-duty military with valid ID.

What are your staffed hours?

Monday through Friday 5:00 AM to 10:00 PM, Saturday 7:00 AM to 8:00 PM, Sunday 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Premium and Elite members have 24/7 keycard access.

Is there parking available?

Free parking is available in our dedicated lot with over 100 spaces.
